tasks.subject: Task 1: Core::Jobs::ThreadPool + ParallelFor
tasks.description: Minimal persistent fork-join ThreadPool + blocking ParallelFor + MU_JOBS flag, doctest-tested.

tasks.subject: Task 2: WorkerArena — per-worker per-vertex scratch (serial-identical)
tasks.description: Move ~30MB per-vertex scratch into per-worker WorkerArena via thread_local pointer + accessor macros; serial-identical.

tasks.subject: Task 3: Bone palette per-entity + reentrancy audit (serial-identical)
tasks.description: Build bone matrices into per-entity OBJECT->BoneTransform; move build-time globals to arena/per-entity/read-only/Phase G; audit doc.

tasks.subject: Task 4: Per-worker instance buckets + merge (serial-identical)
tasks.description: BmdInstanceBatch collects into per-worker bucket sets, merges order-independently at flush; merge unit-tested.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Phase G/B/F restructure of the char pass (serial)
tasks.description: Restructure RenderCharactersClient into Gather/Build/Flush, serial, identical output.

tasks.subject: Task 6.1: Add per-worker BmdRenderContext infra (no field moved)
tasks.description: Create BmdRenderContext.{h,cpp} per-worker (CurrentRenderCtx()/InitRenderCtxs, mirror WorkerArena); call InitRenderCtxs at startup. No field moved, no signature change, nothing reads it. Serial-identical infra. REVISED MECHANISM: per-worker slot, NOT param threading (3409 call sites killed that). Commit 8a2a7071.

tasks.subject: Task 6.2: Migrate placement group to CurrentRenderCtx()
tasks.description: BodyScale/BodyOrigin/BodyHeight + file-global BoneScale -> CurrentRenderCtx(). Repoint setters + ~50 read sites (SkinMesh, Transform, TransformPosition, lit-build, inst gate :1553-1581, shadow). Remove BMD members + file-global. No signature change. A/B.

metadata.verifyCommand: run-harness-ab.bat 1 1 ctx_placement; [bmd_cov] inst=2300 identical; login scene ok

tasks.subject: Task 6.3: Migrate lighting group to CurrentRenderCtx() (HIGH visual risk)
tasks.description: DONE commit dfee77f6. BodyLight/LightEnable/ContrastEnable/ShadowAngle -> CurrentRenderCtx(). CRITICAL FIX: do NOT delete BMD members — RETAIN as reserved layout padding (also re-added 6.2's). Deleting shrinks sizeof(BMD), shifts Models[] rand-offset base onto a pre-existing heap overflow -> silent crash in char render (crash-login). bmd_cov=2300 + login crowd visual OK.

metadata.verifyCommand: run-harness-ab.bat 1 1 ctx_lighting; [bmd_cov] identical; in-game lighting pixel-identical

tasks.subject: Task 6.4: Migrate animation group to CurrentRenderCtx()
tasks.description: BodyAngle, CurrentAction, PriorAction, CurrentAnimation, CurrentAnimationFrame -> CurrentRenderCtx(). Mind PriorAction param-vs-member shadow in Animation. Repoint Animation/PlayAnimation + effect writers (ZzzEffect.cpp:15205-15210). RETAIN BMD members as reserved layout padding (do NOT delete — sizeof(BMD) must stay byte-identical, crash-login). A/B + login crowd harness (crash is silent in bmd_cov).

metadata.verifyCommand: run-harness-ab.bat 1 1 ctx_anim; [bmd_cov] identical; in-game animation identical

tasks.subject: Task 6.5: Migrate mesh-selection group to CurrentRenderCtx()
tasks.description: StreamMesh, Skin, HideSkin, fTransformedSize -> CurrentRenderCtx(). Repoint setters + RenderMesh gates + cross-TU HideSkin reads in ZzzObject.cpp:7661-8859. RETAIN BMD members as reserved layout padding (do NOT delete — sizeof(BMD) must stay byte-identical, crash-login). A/B + login crowd harness (crash is silent in bmd_cov).

tasks.subject: Task 6.6: Per-Transform statics -> per-worker
tasks.description: Move s_lastBoneMatrix/s_lastTransformTranslate/s_lastTransformScale/s_transformSerial/s_lastLightPosition/s_lastLightEnable/s_skinnedSerial/s_meshSkinned[] into per-worker home (ctx or arena) so the 'Transform then RenderMesh same object' correlation holds per-worker. Confirm-dead-and-drop s_skinScratchMin/Max. A/B.

metadata.verifyCommand: run-harness-ab.bat 1 1 ctx_statics; [bmd_cov] identical; skin-skip path intact

tasks.subject: Task 6.7: Collect globals -> per-bucket/instance + kill GL read (HIGH visual risk)
tasks.description: Move s_instLight/s_instWave/s_chromeWave2/s_chromeL/s_chromeLightVec into InstanceRec/per-bucket data OR compute frame-global outside parallel region; precompute flatColor into ctx to replace glGetFloatv(GL_CURRENT_COLOR) at ZzzBMD.cpp:1649. A/B (chrome/wave/flat-color).

metadata.verifyCommand: run-harness-ab.bat 1 1 ctx_collect; [bmd_cov] identical; chrome/wave/flat visuals identical

tasks.subject: Task 6.8: Phase-B side-effects -> Phase G + cross-model attach
tasks.description: Relocate CreateBattleCastleCharacter_Visual (CreateGuardStoneHealingVisual particle/global writes) to Phase G or serial post-pass; keep editor pickbox GL on GL thread. Handle cross-model attach writers (AnimationTransformWithAttachHighModel* this->BodyScale=otherObj->Scale) via CurrentRenderCtx() routing. A/B.

metadata.verifyCommand: run-harness-ab.bat 1 1 ctx_sideeffects; [bmd_cov] identical; battle-castle heal visual identical

tasks.subject: Task 6.9: TURN ON ParallelFor + AppendPalette lock-free + measure (the payoff)
tasks.description: Phase B via ThreadPool::ParallelFor under MU_JOBS (serial below min-entity threshold). Make BonePaletteTBO::AppendPalette lock-free (atomic reserve + memcpy). Add [jobs] profiling (worker count + G/B/F ms). Full race audit (TSan if available). Measure 100ch+200ch: build wall-time/workers, [bmd_cov] identical ON and OFF, in-game multi-map pixel-identical.

metadata.verifyCommand: harness MU_JOBS=0 vs 1 at 100ch+200ch; [jobs] build ms parallel<<serial; [bmd_cov] identical; in-game multi-map

tasks.subject: Task 7: Extend to the objects pass (props) — optional, if ROI remains
tasks.description: Apply G/B/F + ParallelFor to RenderObjects/RenderObjects_AfterCharacter reusing infra; if ROI negligible, document and stop.

metadata.verifyCommand: harness at prop-dense map; [frame] objects parallel<serial; visual identical
